title: PMO Manager
description:
Job Description & Requirements

We’re building out a new PMO function within a global technology organisation that’s growing rapidly across Asia. With new leadership in place, we’re taking the opportunity to scale and mature portfolio governance, demand intake, and prioritisation work across departments.

We’re looking for a PMO Manager who will establish and enhance PMO processes across the Global Information Services (GIS) function - someone who can partner closely with senior stakeholders, design practical PMO frameworks, and help scale governance in a fast‑moving, enterprise technology environment.

The Opportunity

As PMO Manager, you

What You’ll Do

  • Build and implement PMO frameworks from the ground up; refine existing operating models.
  • Define governance cadence, reporting standards, project tracking mechanisms, and delivery methodologies.
  • Lead portfolio & roadmap management across multi‑year GIS programs; drive demand management (intake, prioritisation, resourcing, financials, allocation tracking).
  • Conduct requirements gathering, process mapping, and gap analysis to redesign processes (e.g., project intake, capacity planning, financial tracking).
  • Facilitate workshops and decision forums; align senior global stakeholders on priorities and portfolio impact.

What You’ll Bring

  • 10–15 years’ PMO, portfolio governance, or large‑scale IT program management experience.
  • Proven business analysis depth (process mapping, gap identification, future‑state design) and PMO build experience.
  • Credibility engaging global leaders across infrastructure, applications, and security; excellent communication and facilitation skills
  • Strong understanding of demand management, project intake frameworks, and portfolio planning in enterprise technology environments.

Why Join

  • Shape a new PMO function with executive sponsorship.
  • Work across high‑visibility, cross‑functional initiatives (infra, apps, security).
  • Outcome‑focused culture with hybrid work and global collaboration.

We regret to inform that only shortlisted candidates will be notified / contacted.

EA Registration No.: R2414837, Garey Gan Chia Wen

Allegis Group Singapore Pte Ltd, Company Reg No. 200909448N, EA Licence No. 10C4544

ALLEGIS GROUP SINGAPORE PRIVATE LIMITED

Allegis Group is the global leader in talent solutions focused on working harder and caring more than any other provider. We’ll go further to understand the needs of our people – our clients, our candidates, and our employees – and to consistently deliver on our promise of an unsurpassed quality experience. That’s the Allegis Group difference, and it’s consistent across every Allegis Group company. With more than US$11billion in annual revenues and over 500 locations across the globe, our network provides businesses with a comprehensive suite of talent solutions — without sacrificing the niche expertise required to ensure a successful partnership. Our specialised group of companies includes: Aerotek, TEKsystems, Allegis Global Solutions, Aston Carter, Major, Lindsey & Africa, Allegis Partners, MarketSource, and EASi. Visit www.AllegisGroup.com to learn more.
